# Pregnancy Biological Summary

## Setup & Data

```{r}
library(readr)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(HDAnalyzeR)
library(patchwork)

select <- dplyr::select
rename <- dplyr::rename
```

## Age analysis

```{r}
olink_de <- readRDS("data/MM_estimates_BAMSE_v2.rds") |> 
  filter(term == "Age")

soma_meta <- read_tsv("data/meta_phase2_somalogic_elod_20251028.tsv")
soma_de <- readRDS("data/mm_fixed_effects_bamse_soma.rds") |> 
  filter(term == "Age") |> 
  left_join(soma_meta |> filter(Organism == "Human") |> select(Protein = EntrezGeneSymbol, Assay = AptName), by = "Assay") |> 
  group_by(Protein) |>
  arrange(desc(abs(estimate)), .by_group = TRUE) |>
  slice_head(n = 1) |>
  ungroup() |> 
  select(-Assay) |> 
  rename(Assay = Protein)

olink_explore_1536 <- readRDS("data/olink_explore_1536.rds")
```

### Gene sets

```{r}
olink_explore <- olink_de |> 
  filter(Assay %in% olink_explore_1536) |> 
  mutate(p.adj = p.adjust(p.value, method = "fdr"))

olink_ht <- olink_de |> 
  filter(!Assay %in% olink_explore_1536) |> 
  mutate(p.adj = p.adjust(p.value, method = "fdr"))

soma <- soma_de |> 
  filter(!Assay %in% olink_explore_1536) |> 
  mutate(p.adj = p.adjust(p.value, method = "fdr"))
```

### GSEA - Olink Explore

```{r}
olink_explore_obj <- list(
  de_res = olink_explore |> rename(Feature = Assay)
)
class(olink_explore_obj) <- "hd_de"
olink_explore_obj$de_res <- as_tibble(olink_explore_obj$de_res)
enrichment_go <- hd_gsea(olink_explore_obj, database = "GO", ontology = "ALL", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "estimate")
enrichment_kegg <- hd_gsea(olink_explore_obj, database = "KEGG", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "estimate")
enrichment_reactome <- hd_gsea(olink_explore_obj, database = "Reactome", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "estimate")

go_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_go$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "GO")
kegg_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_kegg$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "KEGG")
reactome_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_reactome$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "Reactome")

combined_olink_explore <- bind_rows(go_tbl, kegg_tbl, reactome_tbl) |> filter(p.adjust < 0.05)

terms_olink_explore <- combined_olink_explore |>
  group_by(Database) |>
  arrange(p.adjust, .by_group = TRUE)

write_csv(terms_olink_explore, "data/terms_olink_explore.csv")
```

### GSEA - Olink HT

```{r}
rm(enrichment_go)
rm(enrichment_kegg)
rm(enrichment_reactome)
olink_ht_obj <- list(
  de_res = olink_ht |> rename(Feature = Assay)
)
class(olink_ht_obj) <- "hd_de"
olink_ht_obj$de_res <- as_tibble(olink_ht_obj$de_res)
enrichment_go <- hd_gsea(olink_ht_obj, database = "GO", ontology = "ALL", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "estimate")
enrichment_kegg <- hd_gsea(olink_ht_obj, database = "KEGG", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "estimate")
enrichment_reactome <- hd_gsea(olink_ht_obj, database = "Reactome", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "estimate")

go_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_go$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "GO")
kegg_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_kegg$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "KEGG")
reactome_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_reactome$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "Reactome")

combined_olink_ht <- bind_rows(go_tbl, kegg_tbl, reactome_tbl) |> filter(p.adjust < 0.05)

terms_olink_ht <- combined_olink_ht |>
  group_by(Database) |>
  arrange(p.adjust, .by_group = TRUE)

write_csv(terms_olink_ht, "data/terms_olink_ht.csv")
```

### GSEA - SomaScan

```{r}
rm(enrichment_go)
rm(enrichment_kegg)
rm(enrichment_reactome)
soma_obj <- list(
  de_res = soma |> rename(Feature = Assay)
)
class(soma_obj) <- "hd_de"
soma_obj$de_res <- as_tibble(soma_obj$de_res)
enrichment_go <- hd_gsea(soma_obj, database = "GO", ontology = "ALL", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "estimate")
enrichment_kegg <- hd_gsea(soma_obj, database = "KEGG", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "estimate")
enrichment_reactome <- hd_gsea(soma_obj, database = "Reactome", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "estimate")

go_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_go$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "GO")
kegg_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_kegg$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "KEGG")
reactome_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_reactome$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "Reactome")

combined_soma <- bind_rows(go_tbl, kegg_tbl, reactome_tbl) |> filter(p.adjust < 0.05)

terms_soma <- combined_soma |>
  group_by(Database) |>
  arrange(p.adjust, .by_group = TRUE)

write_csv(terms_soma, "data/terms_soma.csv")
```

## Sex analysis

```{r}
olink_de <- readRDS("data/MM_estimates_BAMSE_v2.rds") |> 
  filter(term == "SexM")

soma_meta <- read_tsv("data/meta_phase2_somalogic_elod_20251028.tsv")
soma_de <- readRDS("data/mm_fixed_effects_bamse_soma.rds") |> 
  filter(term == "SexM") |> 
  left_join(soma_meta |> filter(Organism == "Human") |> select(Protein = EntrezGeneSymbol, Assay = AptName), by = "Assay") |> 
  group_by(Protein) |>
  arrange(desc(abs(estimate)), .by_group = TRUE) |>
  slice_head(n = 1) |>
  ungroup() |> 
  select(-Assay) |> 
  rename(Assay = Protein)

olink_explore_1536 <- readRDS("data/olink_explore_1536.rds")
```

### Gene sets

```{r}
olink_explore <- olink_de |> 
  filter(Assay %in% olink_explore_1536)

olink_ht <- olink_de |> 
  filter(!Assay %in% olink_explore_1536)

soma <- soma_de |> 
  filter(!Assay %in% olink_explore_1536)
```

### GSEA - Olink Explore

```{r}
olink_explore_obj <- list(
  de_res = olink_explore |> rename(Feature = Assay)
)
class(olink_explore_obj) <- "hd_de"
olink_explore_obj$de_res <- as_tibble(olink_explore_obj$de_res)
enrichment_go <- hd_gsea(olink_explore_obj, database = "GO", ontology = "ALL", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "estimate")
enrichment_reactome <- hd_gsea(olink_explore_obj, database = "Reactome", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "estimate")

go_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_go$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "GO")
reactome_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_reactome$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "Reactome")

combined_olink_explore <- bind_rows(go_tbl, reactome_tbl) |> filter(p.adjust < 0.05)

terms_olink_explore <- combined_olink_explore |>
  group_by(Database) |>
  arrange(p.adjust, .by_group = TRUE)

write_csv(terms_olink_explore, "data/terms_olink_explore_sex.csv")
```

### GSEA - Olink HT

No enrichment in any of the 3 databases.

### GSEA - SomaScan

```{r}
rm(enrichment_go)
rm(enrichment_kegg)
rm(enrichment_reactome)
soma_obj <- list(
  de_res = soma |> rename(Feature = Assay)
)
class(soma_obj) <- "hd_de"
soma_obj$de_res <- as_tibble(soma_obj$de_res)
enrichment_go <- hd_gsea(soma_obj, database = "GO", ontology = "ALL", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "estimate")
enrichment_kegg <- hd_gsea(soma_obj, database = "KEGG", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "estimate")
enrichment_reactome <- hd_gsea(soma_obj, database = "Reactome", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "estimate")

go_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_go$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "GO")
kegg_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_kegg$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "KEGG")
reactome_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_reactome$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "Reactome")

combined_soma <- bind_rows(go_tbl, kegg_tbl, reactome_tbl) |> filter(p.adjust < 0.05)

terms_soma <- combined_soma |>
  group_by(Database) |>
  arrange(p.adjust, .by_group = TRUE)

write_csv(terms_soma, "data/terms_soma_sex.csv")
```

## Age and sex enrichment overview

```{r}
terms_olink_explore_sex <- read_csv("data/terms_olink_explore_sex.csv") |> mutate(Platform = "Olink", Covariate = "Sex")
terms_olink_explore_age <- read_csv("data/terms_olink_explore.csv") |> mutate(Platform = "Olink", Covariate = "Age")
terms_soma_sex <- read_csv("data/terms_soma_sex.csv") |> mutate(Platform = "SomaScan", Covariate = "Sex")
terms_soma_age <- read_csv("data/terms_soma.csv") |> mutate(Platform = "SomaScan", Covariate = "Age")
terms_olink_ht_age <- read_csv("data/terms_olink_ht.csv") |> mutate(Platform = "Olink", Covariate = "Age")

merged_terms_raw <- bind_rows(
  terms_olink_explore_sex, terms_olink_explore_age,
  terms_soma_sex, terms_soma_age,
  terms_olink_ht_age
) |>
  mutate(
    Platform = factor(Platform, levels = c("Olink", "SomaScan")),
    NES = if_else(is.na(NES), 0, NES),
    sig_size = -log10(p.adjust),
    sig_size = if_else(is.infinite(sig_size), 20, sig_size),
    sig_size = if_else(is.na(sig_size), 1, sig_size)
  ) |>
  group_by(Covariate, Platform, Description) |>
  slice_max(order_by = abs(NES), n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) |>
  ungroup()

target_terms <- merged_terms_raw |>
  group_by(Covariate, Platform) |>
  slice_max(order_by = abs(NES), n = 10, with_ties = FALSE) |>
  ungroup() |>
  distinct(Covariate, Description)

merged_terms <- merged_terms_raw |>
  inner_join(target_terms, by = c("Covariate", "Description")) |>
  group_by(Covariate, Description) |>
  mutate(avg_nes = mean(NES, na.rm = TRUE)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  mutate(Description = fct_reorder(Description, avg_nes))

global_size_limits <- c(min(merged_terms$sig_size, na.rm = TRUE), max(merged_terms$sig_size, na.rm = TRUE))
pal_platform <- c("Olink" = "#6FC2EE", "SomaScan" = "#D82F88")

plot_enrichment <- function(data, plot_title) {
  ggplot(data, aes(x = Description, y = NES, color = Platform)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey80") +
    geom_point(aes(size = sig_size), alpha = 0.8) +
    coord_flip() +
    scale_color_manual(values = pal_platform, drop = FALSE) +
    scale_size_continuous(
      limits = global_size_limits, 
      range = c(2, 7), 
      name = expression(-log[10](p.adjust))
    ) +
    scale_x_discrete(labels = scales::label_wrap(55)) + 
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Normalized Enrichment Score", title = plot_title) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8, lineheight = 0.8),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold"),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
    )
}

p_age <- plot_enrichment(
  merged_terms |> filter(Covariate == "Age") |> mutate(Description = fct_drop(Description)), 
  "Age"
)

p_sex <- plot_enrichment(
  merged_terms |> filter(Covariate == "Sex") |> mutate(Description = fct_drop(Description)), 
  "Sex"
) + 
  guides(color = "none", size = "none")

final_combined_plot <- (p_age | p_sex) + 
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") & 
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.box = "horizontal",
    legend.justification = "center",
    legend.box.just = "center"
  )

print(final_combined_plot)

ggsave("results/bamse_enrichment.png", final_combined_plot, width = 29.7, height = 21, units = "cm")
```
